violations.text: Establishment did not have an employee that has completed an approved food safety manager course at time of inspection. A food safety manager must be present at all times when time/temperature control for safety foods are being prepared, handled or served. Per person in charge, employees are in the process of taking a ServSafe course. Please email inspector proof of completion of an approved food safety manager course. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

Establishment could not provide proof that establishment has a certified food safety manager. Establishment must register a food safety manager with the Rhode Island Department of Health Center for Food Protection. Please email proof of registration. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cream cheese) in the refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as cream cheese during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

The following was observed: 1) The non-food contact surfaces of all the cold/hold-holding equipment was observed with an accumulation of food debris (interiors and exteriors of units). 2) The ceiling vents in the front prep area was observed with an accumulation of dust. Non-food contact surfaces to be cleaned as often as necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

At the time of inspection, the grease trap was observed to be in poor repair (leaking). A leaking grease trap can cause potential for contamination of food, utensils, and equipment and, therefore, may cause serious illness or disease outbreaks. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

The floors in the back and front prep area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

The wall mounted sink and surface sanitizer mixer is in need of adjustment. Sanitizer is currently being manually mixed/adjusted to proper solution ppm until unit is serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2023
